description: Product Factory OS hooks for automatic workspace adoption, routing reminders, context diagnostics, and methodology completeness gates.

hooks.name: route-reminder
hooks.description: Suggests /project or /task routes from a user prompt.

hooks.name: preflight-context
hooks.description: Auto-adopts first-level workspace projects when needed, then prints discovered docs and memory state.

hooks.name: session-diagnostics
hooks.description: Prints stale state, recovery, handoff, and telemetry diagnostics from project memory.

hooks.name: skill-completeness
hooks.description: Checks that every skill has contracts, triggers, and route snapshots.

hooks.name: commit-completeness
hooks.description: Checks staged methodology diffs for required supporting artifacts before commit.

hooks.name: review-before-commit
hooks.description: Runs fast PFO validation gates before committing methodology changes.
